Notes: 2021 Pilot/Flying J South Atlantic Conference Women's Basketball championship
Tusculum wins its second straight SAC Tournament title and fourth overall
Tusculum earns automatic bid to NCAA Division II Women's Tournament
Game.Officials: Daniel Drake (R),  Josh Loggins (U1),  Desmond Sullivan (U2)
